Plaintiff Resurgence Financial, Llc'S Motion To Amend Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Mar-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC (change defendant name from Tim O. Olawoye to Tim O. Olawoye aka Gabriel Olawoye). No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted, no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Mar-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to March 4, 2011. Moving party to provide courtesy copies to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
